review_scope: current implementation and evidence readiness for SOTA execution

fresh_verification.result: goal_achieved_permitted false; expected until S9, S10, final-report.json, and runtime counterexample review are complete

findings: Approved review exists and includes the pre-goal counterexample gate.
runtime-status.json and verifier evidence do not incorrectly allow goal_achieved.
Writable scope is broad because docs/ is writable while approved control JSON also lives under docs/; using-control-json read-only rules override this ambiguity for runtime execution.
S8 pass means the hard-threshold matrix was evaluated, not that SOTA passed.
Current benchmark evidence is a local HTTP target over local HTTPS proxy smoke with insecure proxy TLS and no proxy mTLS.
Current numeric hard metrics fail p50 and variance gates; confidence bounds and full HTTPS origin/proxy mTLS scenarios are absent.
Causal performance evidence is still partial and lacks profiling, tracing, ablation, or reuse-parity proof.
Final counterexample review and final-report.json are still missing.
Proxy mTLS endpoint evidence is async-only; final claims must not state unqualified sync plus async mTLS endpoint coverage.

must_not_claim: unqualified sync plus async proxy mTLS endpoint coverage
next_required_work: Complete causal performance evidence with real-client-path, same-model libcurl parity, profiling/tracing/ablation, and confidence-bound analysis.
Extend benchmark matrix beyond local insecure HTTP-origin smoke to HTTPS origin over HTTPS proxy and proxy mTLS parity scenarios.
Run final independent runtime counterexample review after S9 passes.
Write final-report.json only after the current verifier can permit the final claim.
